I am DeepSeek, an AI assistant created by DeepSeek Company. I'm the latest version of the DeepSeek model, designed to provide helpful and detailed responses across a wide range of topics. 

I'm a text-based AI model with strong capabilities in reasoning, analysis, and problem-solving. While I don't have multimodal vision capabilities, I can process uploaded files including images, PDFs, Word documents, Excel files, and more to read and analyze text content within them.

If you have any questions or need assistance with something specific, feel free to ask - I'm here to help!
